title: A bank balance that climbs while you sleep
subtitle: A short visualisation for the felt sense of money growing without your direct effort.
excerpt: A five-minute visualisation practice from Day 34 of the MONEY program. The scene: waking up and opening the banking app to find the balance higher than when you went to bed.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Creative visualisation for the felt sense of effortless income.

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to build the felt sense of income arriving without your direct input.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation from Day 34 of the MONEY program. The scene is a morning: waking up and opening the banking app before getting out of bed.
Sit quietly. Close your eyes. Take a slow breath in and let it go.
Picture the morning. Early. Your bedroom is quiet. You wake up before the alarm.
Before you get up, you open the banking app on your phone. The balance is higher than it was when you went to bed last night. You were asleep. You didn't do anything. Something moved.
The increase can be any amount that feels real and significant to you. A product sale, a subscription renewal, an automated income of some kind.
Now picture this happening on three consecutive mornings in the same week. Different amounts. Different sources. All while you were asleep.
Let the picture be ordinary rather than dramatic. Not a lottery win: a working system. Stay with it for a minute. Then open your eyes.
Original to homemade.education. Creative visualisation for building the felt sense of effortless income.
